'''Bird Nest''' is a other item.

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
Once the home to a chirping little critter, this nest now best serves as a means of gathering materials. Don’t feel bad about destroying a little bird’s home, they were saying horrible things about you anyway. I mean really horrible, like so, so bad.
}}
